race.description: Hot Dub Time Machine After Party Oct 3 Bm70+ Hcp
race.comment: STYLIN' (11) continued her winning streak by scoring the Provincial Championships last start at Belmont, scoring by 1L in an impressive display. Up in grade today, but she continues to raise the bar and she makes plenty of appeal down in the weights. Looks a smart filly on the rise. SCOTTISH LAIRD (8) missed in a photo finish last start over 1300m and looks well placed here third-up. Loves this track and trip having won 2/4 and an inside draw this time can see him settle a touch closer. Right down in the weights now and looks a leading chance. CALIFORNICATION (9) is another who boasts a strong record at this track and trip. He's right back in grade today after never featuring at Belmont last time out and looks beautifully placed here third-up. Expecting a much better run here. PRAWNS ELEVEN (1) steps up in trip today which is the query, but his best form would see him hard to hold out. FEUDING (6) can strike third-up.
